items.title: 2 Dividend Stocks to Double Up on Right Now
items.author: Lawrence Rothman, Cfa
items.description: Walmart and Home Depot are two dividend-paying stocks with strong growth prospects. Walmart has seen consistent sales growth and profitability, while Home Depot's performance has been impacted by economic factors but is poised to benefit from improving conditions.

insights.sentiment_reasoning: Walmart has a strong business model, with a focus on keeping costs low and investing in technology to improve the customer experience. The company has consistently raised its dividend and has a healthy free cash flow to support its business and dividend payments.

Home Depot's results have been impacted by economic factors, such as higher interest rates and inflation, leading to a drop in comparable sales. However, the article notes that there are positive developments, such as a reversal in existing home sales declines and the Federal Reserve cutting short-term rates, which could help boost Home Depot's sales and earnings in the future.
